mapper.insert: INSERT INTO agent_chat_message ( id, task_id, user_id, sequence_no, role, message_type, content, payload_json, source_event_type, source_id, dedupe_key ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{taskId}, #{userId}, #{sequenceNo}, #{role}, #{messageType}, #{content}, #{payloadJson}, #{sourceEventType}, #{sourceId}, #{dedupeKey} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, task_id, user_id, sequence_no, role, message_type, content, payload_json, source_event_type, source_id, dedupe_key, created_at, updated_at FROM agent_chat_message WHERE task_id = #{taskId} AND dedupe_key = #{dedupeKey}

SELECT id, task_id, user_id, sequence_no, role, message_type, content, payload_json, source_event_type, source_id, dedupe_key, created_at, updated_at FROM agent_chat_message WHERE id = #{id} AND task_id = #{taskId}
mapper.update: UPDATE agent_chat_message SET role = #{role}, message_type = #{messageType}, content = #{content}, payload_json = #{payloadJson}, source_event_type = #{sourceEventType}, source_id = #{sourceId}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE task_id = #{taskId} AND dedupe_key = #{dedupeKey}
mapper.select: SELECT id, task_id, user_id, sequence_no, role, message_type, content, payload_json, source_event_type, source_id, dedupe_key, created_at, updated_at FROM agent_chat_message WHERE task_id = #{taskId} ORDER BY sequence_no ASC

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT id, task_id, user_id, sequence_no, role, message_type, content, payload_json, source_event_type, source_id, dedupe_key, created_at, updated_at FROM agent_chat_message WHERE task_id = #{taskId} ORDER BY sequence_no DESC LIMIT #{limit} ) recent_messages ORDER BY sequence_no ASC

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT id, task_id, user_id, sequence_no, role, message_type, content, payload_json, source_event_type, source_id, dedupe_key, created_at, updated_at FROM agent_chat_message WHERE task_id = #{taskId} AND (
sequence_no < ( SELECT sequence_no FROM agent_chat_message WHERE task_id = #{taskId} AND id = #{anchorMessageId} )
sequence_no < ( SELECT sequence_no FROM agent_chat_message WHERE task_id = #{taskId} AND id = #{coveredMessageStartId} )
1 = 0
) ORDER BY sequence_no DESC LIMIT #{limit} ) before_messages ORDER BY sequence_no ASC
